prompt: Change those weird looking sphere with roots into jellyfishes. Those jellyfishes should be at the same size and position as the original spheres. Add glow to the jellyfishes.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform all the floating, spherical, plant-like creatures with trailing root structures into jellyfishes. The new jellyfishes must maintain the exact size and spatial position of the original creatures. Each jellyfish should also emanate a distinct glow.
